name: The Legend Of The Black Wizard
developer: Asger Heinricy, Juan Sevenster, Naga Lalith Shashank Jonnabhotla, Daniel Escobar, Ada Grünbaum, Ashley Wright, Aidan Alan Wright, Esam Din, Alexander Lindgren
short_description: The 'Wizard' (Player) is in an open world 2D Top-Down map. The thing is, not everyone likes him. There's bounties on him, and he needs to survive. He can find allies that can help him, or he can be un
